Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Understand the Goal The user wants me to analyze a specific event log process mining data from a financial services company The key challenge is that activity names are reused within the same cases for example Verify Documents happens twice in C001 and C003 Call Customer happens twice in C002 but they mean different things based on context timestamp resource additional context I need to rename these to make them unique and descriptive

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Analyze the Data Case C001 Verify Documents happens twice First is initial check second is re check after missing info Case C002 Call Customer happens twice First is for clarification investigation second is confirmation closure Case C003 Similar to C001 regarding Verify Documents First is initial physical check second is re verification post adjustment

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Identify Ambiguous Activities and Determine Renaming Strategy Activity Verify Documents Instance 1 occurs early It is the first check C001 checks identity documents C002 identity verification C003 physical verification of ID Proposed Name Initial Document Check Instance 2 occurs later usually after a loop or an adjustment C001 re checks after ID scan upload C003 re verify docs after account adjustment Proposed Name Re verify Documents

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Activity Call Customer Instance 1 C001 happens because verification failed needed more info Context request missing docs Request Missing Information Call or Clarification Call Instance 1 C002 happens to clarify discrepancy Investigation Call Instance 2 C002 follow up after adjustment Confirmation Call Instance 1 C003 customer stepped away Customer Retrieval Call

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Synthesis In C001 and C002 first occurrence It is about getting info or clarifying issues blocking the process Lets call this Call for Clarification In C002 second occurrence It is confirming the fix Lets call this Confirm Resolution Call

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Wait the prompt asks to rename activities If I make them too specific per case I might end up with 5 different names for Call Customer Is that what is wanted Self Correction on Granularity If I create too many unique names the log becomes messy Is there a middle ground Lets stick to the prompts instruction rename the activities so that their names clearly reflect their contextual differences Being descriptive is safer than being abstract here

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: Ideally we group them if the semantic intent is similar or split if distinct Group A the We have a problem need info calls C001 Call C002 Call 1 Name Outbound Inquiry Call Group B the Its done Check this calls C002 Call 2 Name Resolution Confirmation Call Group C C003 Call Specific scenario

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Final Review of the Output Format Task 1 Identify Interpret Task 2 Rename Task 3 Revised Log Task 4 Justification This looks solid It captures the nuance required
